blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 16 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,761 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 49.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 24" over the past week. Current depth: 75".
